title: 发票、装箱单和清关文件
theme: 从 invoice / packing list / declared value 开始
goals: 能根据客户或货代要求准备 invoice、packing list 和清关资料
能确认 HS code、declared value、consignee 和产品描述等关键信息
能处理客户要求修改单据时的风险和确认流程

review.title: Day 22 复习
items: 昨天练了 balance payment、payment reminder、before shipment、credit term 和 release goods。
今天进入出货单据阶段：付款确认后，客户或货代通常会要求发票、装箱单和清关资料。
单据沟通要准确，尤其是 consignee、product description、HS code 和 declared value。

preview.scenario: 客户货代要求你提供商业发票、装箱单、HS code 和申报金额。客户可能要求修改收货人信息、产品描述或申报价值，你需要谨慎确认并避免不合规表达。
needToKnow: invoice 和 packing list 是清关常用基础文件。
HS code 和 declared value 会影响清关和税费，不能随意填写。
document revision 需要客户确认最终版本，避免发错文件给货代。

vocabulary.usage: 用于列明货物、金额、买卖双方和付款信息的单据。
vocabulary.example: I will prepare the invoice for your customs clearance.

vocabulary.usage: 用于列明箱数、重量、尺寸和包装明细。
vocabulary.example: The packing list will show the carton quantity and gross weight.

vocabulary.usage: 用于清关申报和税率判断。
vocabulary.example: Please ask your customs broker to confirm the HS code.

vocabulary.usage: 用于海关申报金额，通常需与实际交易保持一致。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the declared value before we issue the invoice.

vocabulary.usage: 用于发票、装箱单、提单信息、产地证等清关资料。
vocabulary.example: We will send the customs documents to your forwarder.

vocabulary.meaning: 收货人 / 提单收货方
vocabulary.usage: 用于单据上的收货公司或收货人信息。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the consignee information for the invoice.

vocabulary.usage: 用于发票和装箱单上描述货物名称、型号或材质。
vocabulary.example: The product description should match the actual goods.

vocabulary.meaning: 文件修改 / 单据修改
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求修改发票、装箱单或其他清关文件。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the document revision before we send it to your forwarder.

sentences.label: 发送清关文件
sentences.basic: I send invoice and packing list.
sentences.natural: I will send you the invoice and packing list.
sentences.business: I will send you the invoice, packing list, and other customs documents for your forwarder to review.

sentences.label: 确认 HS code
sentences.natural: Please ask your customs broker to confirm the HS code.
sentences.business: We can provide our suggested HS code, but please ask your customs broker to confirm the final HS code for import clearance.

sentences.label: 确认申报金额
sentences.natural: Please confirm the declared value for the invoice.
sentences.business: Please confirm the declared value before we issue the invoice, as it should match the actual order information.

sentences.label: 确认收货人信息
sentences.business: Please confirm the consignee name, address, tax number, and contact information for the customs documents.

sentences.label: 处理单据修改
sentences.natural: We can revise the document after your confirmation.
sentences.business: We can make the document revision after your confirmation, but please check carefully before we send the final version to your forwarder.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太短，没有说明文件用途，也没有提醒客户或货代检查。
chatAnalysis.better: I will send you the invoice and packing list for review.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: I will send you the invoice, packing list, and other customs documents for your forwarder to review.

chatAnalysis.problem: 有合规风险，不应随意承诺低报申报价值。
chatAnalysis.better: Please confirm the declared value for the invoice.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please confirm the declared value before we issue the invoice, as it should match the actual order information.

chatAnalysis.problem: HS code 需要进口方或货代最终确认，不能由卖方随意保证。
chatAnalysis.better: Please ask your customs broker to confirm the HS code.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We can provide our suggested HS code, but please ask your customs broker to confirm the final HS code for import clearance.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：货代索要发票和装箱单

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our forwarder needs the invoice and packing list.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will prepare the invoice and packing list for your forwarder.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send them today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. I will send the customs documents for your review today.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：确认收货人和产品描述

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Before we issue the invoice, please confirm the consignee information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What information do you need?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We need the consignee name, address, tax number, and contact information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will send the details to you.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户要求修改申报价值

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you put a lower declared value on the invoice?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We need to make sure the declared value matches the actual order information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our broker said it may reduce tax.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please confirm the correct declared value with your customs broker before we issue the final invoice.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：货代要求清关文件并修改单据

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our forwarder is asking for the customs documents.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will prepare the invoice, packing list, and other customs documents for your forwarder to review.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include the HS code on the invoice.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We can provide our suggested HS code, but please ask your customs broker to confirm the final HS code for import clearance.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will check with the broker.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please also confirm the consignee information for the invoice.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The consignee should be our importing company.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please send the consignee name, address, tax number, and contact information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What product description will you use?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We will use the product description based on the actual goods and the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you make the description more general?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We can adjust the wording if needed, but the product description should still match the actual goods.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our broker also asked about the declared value.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please confirm the declared value before we issue the invoice, as it should match the actual order information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we use a lower value?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We need to follow the correct order information. Please confirm the proper declared value with your customs broker.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Understood. I will confirm it first.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. After you confirm the value and consignee information, I will issue the draft documents.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send a draft before the final documents?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, I will send the draft invoice and packing list for your review first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If we need changes, can you revise them?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can make the document revision after your confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please do not send the final version to the forwarder before our approval.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will wait for your approval before sending the final version to your forwarder.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send everything in one email.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send the invoice, packing list, HS code suggestion, declared value, and consignee details together for your review.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我会把发票、装箱单和其他清关文件发给您的货代审核。
exercises.answer: I will send the invoice, packing list, and other customs documents to your forwarder for review.
acceptable: i will send the invoice packing list and other customs documents to your forwarder for review
i will send you the invoice packing list and other customs documents for your forwarder to review

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更合规：we can write low value
exercises.answer: Please confirm the declared value before we issue the invoice, as it should match the actual order information.
acceptable: please confirm the declared value before we issue the invoice as it should match the actual order information
the declared value should match the actual order information
exercises.hint: 不要承诺低报，用 declared value 和 actual order information。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Please ask your customs broker to confirm the final HS ____.
客户货代要清关资料，哪个回复更适合？
options: I will send the invoice, packing list, and other customs documents for your forwarder to review.
exercises.answer: I will send the invoice, packing list, and other customs documents for your forwarder to review.
acceptable: i will send the invoice packing list and other customs documents for your forwarder to review
exercises.hint: 要明确 invoice、packing list 和 customs documents。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认收货人名称、地址、税号和联系方式。
exercises.answer: Please confirm the consignee name, address, tax number, and contact information.
acceptable: please confirm the consignee name address tax number and contact information
please confirm the consignee name address tax id and contact information

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Please do not send the final documents before our approval. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Understood. We will wait for your approval before sending the final version to your forwarder.
acceptable: understood we will wait for your approval before sending the final version to your forwarder
we will wait for your approval before sending the final version to your forwarder
exercises.hint: final version 和 forwarder 都要表达清楚。

homework: 把 invoice、packing list、HS code、declared value、customs documents、consignee、product description、document revision 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 HS code 和 declared value 的合规表达。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户货代索要清关文件，你要确认收货人、HS code、申报价值，并说明先发草稿给客户审核。
tomorrow: Day 24 会练银行信息、付款错误和退款路径。
